overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand Gothic great hall resembling a magical dining hall, featuring floating candles, long wooden dining tables with students, and dramatic sunlight streaming through large stained glass windows. The scene is rendered in a high-end game engine with realistic lighting and atmospheric effects.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand Gothic great hall with floating candles illuminating the space. Long wooden dining tables fill the center with students seated and dining. Warm sunlight streams through a large stained glass window at the far end, casting dramatic light beams across the marble floor. The architecture features tall stone arches and medieval design elements typical of a magical school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a grand Gothic great hall that emphasizes the interplay between magical illumination and natural light. It begins by capturing the vastness of the space, where floating candles cast a soft glow over students seated at long wooden dining tables. As the eye moves deeper into the hall, the focus shifts toward the towering stone arches and medieval architectural details that frame the center of the room. The scene finally culminates in the dramatic beams of warm sunlight streaming through a large stained glass window, which cast vivid patterns across the polished marble floor.
